---
title: "Your Proposal Title Here"
format:
  nsf-proposal-typst:
    margin:
      x: 0.75in
      y: 0.75in
    fontsize: 10pt
---

<!-- PI SUMMARY – Brief narrative overview of the proposal.
     Some solicitations require a one-page personal statement or
     fellowship summary. Adjust the content and length to match
     your solicitation's requirements.

     This template uses slightly tighter margins and smaller font
     to fit more content on one page. Adjust as needed. -->

TODO: Write a brief narrative overview of the proposed project in
your own voice. Cover:

- Your research focus and what motivates this work
- The specific aims or objectives
- Your host institution and collaborator (if applicable)
- Why you are positioned to execute this project
- The expected impact and outcomes
- Timeline and budget overview

This document is optional depending on your solicitation. Delete
this file and remove it from _quarto.yml if not needed.
